items.title: Lyft stock surges 13% on Waymo robotaxi deal in Nashville
items.description: Lyft and Waymo said they plan to roll out an autonomous ride-hailing service in Nashville next year.

items.title: Fast and Cheap: The Two Shortcuts That Fuel Freight Fraud
items.description: This article is contributed content. It does not reflect the views or opinions of FreightWaves or any of its subsidiaries. This article has been updated following commentary and feedback from Amazon. Fraud takes root and multiplies in a system that rewards speed and low cost above all else. items.title: Heavy Out-of-the-Money Put Options Activity in Amazon - Setting a Lower AMZN Buy-In Point
items.description: Heavy, unusual out-of-the-money (OTM) put options activity in Amazon highlights a potentially attractive buy-in play for short sellers of AMZN puts. This is seen in today's Barchart Unusual Stock Options Activity Report.

items.title: Walmart Stock Heads for a Record High. The Retailer Could Become a Leader in ‘Agentic’ AI.
items.description: Walmart  may not be the first company that comes to mind when you hear the term artificial intelligence.  Analysts at BofA Securities believe  Walmart  is set to become “a leader in agentic AI.”  Analysts with the firm noted that Walmart’s flagship AI agent, Sparky, “is testing well and will soon start taking ‘agentic’ action” as opposed to just answering questions.

items.title: Why Lyft Stock Was Climbing Today
items.description: Lyft surprised the market with a new partnership with Waymo.
